tracks.meaning: a decision or judgment given by a court, judge, or official body, typically in favor of one party in a dispute
a prize or honor given to someone in recognition of achievement or excellence
to give or bestow something as a prize, honor, or compensation to someone
to grant or allocate money, funds, or resources to a person or organization, especially by contract or grant
a prize or trophy given to a winner of a competition or sporting event
to give someone credit or acknowledgment for something they have done or deserve
to grant official recognition, rank, or decoration to a service member for valor or service
a prize or winnings given to someone who has won a bet or game of chance
